name: doitforme-shift
description: Shift plugin for Codex with MCP setup guidance and bundled marketing skills.

interface.shortDescription: Marketing operations and analysis for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Installs Shift skills and a remote MCP server definition. Users still provide their personal SHIFT_MCP_API_KEY during setup.
defaultPrompt: Audit my active Meta and Google campaigns.
Find wasted spend across my connected providers.
Write fresh performance ad copy from current account context.
